# CommerceFix

CommerceFix is a Shopify CSV Repair File Generator. It scans Shopify product CSV files for import risks, SEO metadata gaps, and image CSV issues.

Free scan:
- issue counts
- issue categories
- first 5 examples

Paid repair files:
- fixed_import_safe.csv
- seo_patch_only.csv
- error_report.xlsx
- before_after_preview.html

Core pages:
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/commercefix-csv-repair/
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/commercefix-csv-repair/error-library.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/commercefix-csv-repair/sample-report.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/commercefix-csv-repair/privacy.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/commercefix-csv-repair/terms.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/commercefix-csv-repair/contact.html
